languages.text: "Уже нет. Мое бездействие было достаточно долгим, чтобы раны затянулись. Я готов к бою".
"Not anymore. My inaction was long, and my wounds have healed. I am ready for battle."
languages.original_text: "Уже нет. Мое бездействие было достаточно долгим, чтобы раны затянулись. Я готов к бою".

traits.locale_text: "Not anymore. My inaction was long, and my wounds have healed. I am ready for battle."

languages.text: 「私も同意です。1分1秒が大切です」

traits.locale_text: 「私も同意です。1分1秒が大切です。」

languages.text: «Ya no. He pasado mucho tiempo sin hacer nada y mis heridas se han curado. Estoy listo para combatir».
languages.original_text: "Not anymore. My inaction was long, and my wounds have healed. I am ready for battle."

traits.locale_text: «Ya no. He pasado mucho tiempo sin hacer nada y mis heridas se han curado. Estoy listo para combatir».

languages.text: “不再是了。我沉寂太久，伤势也已痊愈。我随时可以投入战斗。”
languages.original_text: "Not anymore. My inaction was long, and my wounds have healed. I am ready for battle."

traits.locale_text: “不再是了。我沉寂太久，伤势也已痊愈。我随时可以投入战斗。”

languages.text: "Nicht mehr. Ich war lange untätig, und meine Wunden sind verheilt. Ich bin bereit für den Kampf."
languages.original_text: "Not anymore. My inaction was long, and my wounds have healed. I am ready for battle."

traits.locale_text: "Nicht mehr. Ich war lange untätig, und meine Wunden sind verheilt. Ich bin bereit für den Kampf."

languages.text: "Artık değil. Hareketsizliğim uzun sürdü, yaralarım iyileşti. Savaşa hazırım."
languages.original_text: "Not anymore. My inaction was long, and my wounds have healed. I am ready for battle."

traits.locale_text: "Artık değil. Hareketsizliğim uzun sürdü, yaralarım iyileşti. Savaşa hazırım."

languages.text: « Plus maintenant. Je suis resté inactif si longtemps que mes blessures se sont soignées. Je suis prêt à combattre. »
